flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Solano Community College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.6k → $9.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Solano Community College fell 27% between 2009 and 2010 (10.7% → 7.8%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Solano Community College rose 11% between 2007 and 2010 ($4.0k → $4.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Solano Community College rose 11% between 2007 and 2010 ($690 → $764).
